concepts.headline: The productivity data tells a different story.
concepts.subtext: Stanford tracked 16,000 workers for nine months. The numbers challenge both extremes.
data_points: 73% | Remote workers who feel more productive
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on 1200x630px canvas. Headline at 52px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.03em anchored left at 72px from edge, occupying top-left quadrant. Subtext at 17px weight 400 color #555 directly below with 28px gap. Four stat tiles arranged in a 2x2 grid in the lower two-thirds, left-aligned. Each tile: white background with 1px #e5e5e5 border, square corners, value in DM Mono 38px #111, label in DM Mono 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em #888, 32px internal padding. A 2px warm sand accent bar #d7c8af at top of grid spanning left-tile edges fading to transparent. Particle dot network scattered in right 30% of canvas at 0.08 opacity, 3-6px dots with 0.5px hairline connectors. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left in Inter 11px uppercase #888. 72px canvas padding throughout. Right third is predominantly empty, creating breathing room.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, card surface #f0efe9, headline #111, subtext #555, stat values #111 DM Mono, stat labels #888 DM Mono, accent bar #d7c8af, borders #e5e5e5, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity
concepts.reasoning: Four distinct quantitative proof points from the post (73%, 13%, 24%, 9 months) map naturally to a multi-stat panel. The contrast between the 73% perception and 13% reality is the editorial tension Flywheel compositions thrive on.

concepts.headline: Intentional flexibility outperforms both extremes.
concepts.subtext: Stanford's nine-month study of 16,000 workers found hybrid beats fully remote by 24%. The data favors the middle.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on 1200x630px warm off-white #faf9f6 canvas. FLYWHEEL watermark centered behind all content at 0.03 opacity, 140px bold uppercase Inter, creating textural depth. Primary headline centered at 54px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.04em #111, constrained to 800px max-width centered column, line-broken at natural rhythm across two lines. A 2px warm sand bar #d7c8af 120px wide centered above the headline with 32px margin below it. Subtext at 17px weight 400 #555 centered below headline with 36px gap, max-width 560px. Two small DM Mono stat callouts arranged symmetrically below subtext: '13% remote' and '24% hybrid' in 13px uppercase spaced 80px apart, color #888, separated by a centered hairline 0.5px vertical rule 20px tall in #e5e5e5. FLYWHEEL logotype bottom-center 11px uppercase #888 with 64px bottom padding. Generous negative space in upper and lower thirds.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity, stat labels #888 DM Mono, divider rule #e5e5e5
concepts.reasoning: The post's core argument is a declarative truth about intentional flexibility. A centered bold statement lets that singular insight breathe with maximum editorial authority, while the flanking stat callouts preserve the data without cluttering the composition.

concepts.headline: The sweet spot is intentional flexibility.
concepts.subtext: Remote workers gain 13% productivity. Hybrid workers gain 24% over fully remote. Neither extreme wins. Stanford, 16,000 workers, nine months.
data_points: 13% productivity lift: fully remote vs. office
24% productivity lift: hybrid vs. fully remote
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on 1200x630px #ffffff canvas. A 2px warm sand bar #d7c8af spans the full left edge of the content column as a vertical left-border accent on the insight block, 6px wide fading bottom. 'KEY FINDING' eyebrow label in DM Mono 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.08em #888 at top-left, 72px from edges. Headline at 50px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.03em #111 below eyebrow with 20px gap, max-width 680px left-anchored, breaking naturally across two lines. Subtext at 17px #555 below headline with 28px gap, max-width 580px. Three data rows stacked below with 20px gaps: each row is a left-aligned line with a 2px #d7c8af square dot marker, DM Mono 13px value in #111 and label in #888, no borders. Particle dot network occupying right 35% of canvas at 0.07 opacity, 2-5px dots with 0.5px hairline connectors. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left 11px uppercase #888. Right third of canvas is open negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, eyebrow #888 DM Mono, headline #111, subtext #555, data values #111 DM Mono, data labels #888, accent markers #d7c8af, particle network #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post has a single clear thesis supported by three data points, making the key takeaway card ideal. The left-border accent treatment frames the insight block with editorial precision while the sparse data rows deliver proof without visual noise.

selection_reasoning: The multi-stat panel best serves this post because the editorial tension between the 73% perception stat and the 13% and 24% reality stats is the entire argument. Presenting all four numbers together in a structured grid lets the contradiction speak for itself, which is quintessential Flywheel restraint: data arranged so the insight is self-evident, with no rhetorical decoration needed. The left-anchored layout, particle dot texture, and warm sand accent bar keep it within the brand's premium publication aesthetic.
